mapper.select: /* SQL ID : LogUserActvDAO.selectLogUserActvList 설 명 : 강의실 활동 로그 조회 현황(TB_LMS_LOG_USER_ACTV) 페이징 */

/* 설명 : 사용자과목접속목록조회 - 현재시간보다 120분이전 접속기록조회*/ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT S.SBJCT_ID, LUA.USER_ID, S.SBJCTNM, USR.USERNM, O.ORGNM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY LUA.USER_ID ORDER BY LUA.ACTV_DATETIME DESC ) AS RN, NVL(USR.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_LOG_USER_ACTV LUA ON LUA.SBJCT_ID = ADM.SBJCT_ID AND LUA.ACTV_DATETIME >= (SYSDATE - NUMTODSINTERVAL(120, 'MINUTE')) JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON S.SBJCT_ID = ADM.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USR.USER_ID = LUA.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG O ON O.ORG_ID = USR.ORG_ID WHERE ADM.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN = 1 ORDER BY USERNM
